violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen, beverage area and hibachi stations were lacking paper towels. Paper towels provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Raw animal foods (such as a bowl of raw chicken) were observed stored with ready-to-eat foods (such as a large bowl of cabbage) on the food prep table. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Bowl of chicken separated, cabbage rewashed and to be used for stir-fry. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Dead and trapped flies, observed on sticky paper, located in the basement. PIC informed to remove strips and replace. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by large droppings and evidence of nesting material. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The vanity to the (employee) bathroom hand sink was not in good repair. Inspector observed large openings to base. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage carts, counters, shelves, refrigeration units, etc. have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen and basement have an accumulation of soil residue, rodent droppings and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
Food product observed being store in non food grade plastic bags. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

Raw animal foods (chicken and beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives, ice machine and vegetable peelers) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC moved to 3 bay sink to washed and sanitized. Ice machine taken out of service and ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment not allowed to use for sanitizing of utensils and equipment . PIC to use 3 bay sink for sanitizing until repaired/and or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2024

(Various food product) was observed held at (49-50) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

(Fish) was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
Thermometer in walk in cooler was in poor repair. Displaying inadequate ambient temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

The presence of (rodents and roaches ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
Various food product observed being stored in on food grade plastic bags and bins New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses and between prep unit and prep table. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
Towels were observed being stored on top of produce in walk in cooler. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
(walk in cooler ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair. Observed ambient temperatures at 49 DF. Service call was made during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

The following non-food contact observed with debris:1.Prep tables in kitchen have debris and rodent droppings2.Ansul pipes have grease buildup.3.Soap dispensers at sinks in hibachi area observed with dirt, debris and roach droppings4.Grease traps observed with an accumulation of soil residue and other debris.5.Sink surface under 3 bay sink has an accumulation of debris6.all refrigeration units observed with food and other debris7.pipes throughout kitchen observed with rodent droppings and other debris8.rice cooker has debris buildup9.food storage bins observed with debris10.rolling carts observed with soil residue and debris New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Leakage observed at pipes under 3 bay sink and the prep sink air gap is unaligned with pipes under sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

A hose is connected to the faucet at the (mop sink ). This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
The (walls ) in the (near stairs in basement ) area is in poor repair. Observed holes The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2024
The (ceilings ) in the (basement) area is in poor repair. Observed holes The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
Light bulbs in hood system observed in poor repair. Two Bulbs were blown. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024
The ceiling in the basement in the dry storage area and liquor room is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023
